name: Casa Fabiola
sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; photos need owner approval before use
title: A Ghent apartment with the feeling of coming home.
tagline: Family, heritage, and city warmth directly beside Gent-Sint-Pieters station.
description: Casa Fabiola is the Ghent city stay in the collection: a private upper-floor apartment in the family townhouse, rooted in family, heritage, comfort, and a very practical station-side location.
publicListingTitle: Modern spacious apartment directly at Gent SP station

sourceAudit.label: Public title
sourceAudit.value: Modern spacious apartment directly at Gent SP station

listingHighlights.label: Station-side location
listingHighlights.value: Gent-Sint-Pieters station, tram, bus, taxi, shops, bars, restaurants, and a supermarket are all described as immediately nearby.

listingHighlights.label: Self check-in
listingHighlights.value: The public listing describes number-code access and a private lockable entrance to the apartment floors.

listingHighlights.label: Top 5% proof
listingHighlights.value: Airbnb marks the stay as a guest favourite and top 5% of eligible homes based on ratings, reviews, and reliability.

stayStory.title: The stay
stayStory.text: Casa Fabiola turns the family-house story into a practical Ghent city base, with the entire two upper floors kept private for guests.

stayStory.title: Inside
stayStory.text: The listing describes a bedroom with double bed, sofa, smart TV and dressing room, plus a bathroom with bath, shower and two sinks.

stayStory.title: Mezzanine
stayStory.text: The upper mezzanine adds a real-mattress sofa bed, a single bed, lounge corner, and a quiet workspace.

stayStory.title: Access
stayStory.text: Guests share only the front door and small entrance hall, then have a private lockable entrance and stairs to the apartment.

amenityGroups.title: Sleeping setup
items: Bedroom 2: double bed and single bed

bookingSteps: Use Airbnb to confirm live dates, price, cancellation policy, and final availability.
Select the correct guest count, with 5 guests maximum as the current public maximum.
Keep payment and guest-host messaging inside Airbnb until a direct booking layer is approved.
Use House of Wander for story, comparison, guidance, and source-labelled decision support.
houseNotes: Guests must climb stairs; no lift is listed.
Carbon monoxide alarm is not reported; smoke alarm listed.
locationNote: Casa Fabiola sits directly beside Gent-Sint-Pieters station, with public transport, shops, restaurants, Citadel Park, and Blaarmeersen nearby.
sourceNotes: Public Airbnb facts were checked on May 27, 2026 without login.
The older collection-listings cross-check could not find Casa Fabiola by name; the direct vanity URL resolves the match.
Airbnb-hosted photos are catalogued only as references and are not displayed on the site.

amigoStayPlan.title: Fit guide
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can position Casa Fabiola as the easiest Ghent city base for train arrivals, families, and guests who want space.

amigoStayPlan.title: Practical guide
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can explain the stairs, private upper floors, sleeping setup, self check-in, and nearby transport.

amigoStayPlan.title: Booking guardrail
amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo sends live dates, pricing, cancellation, payment, and host messaging back to Airbnb.

amigoPrompts.label: Who is Casa Fabiola for?
amigoPrompts.answer: Casa Fabiola is strongest for guests who want a spacious Ghent base near Gent-Sint-Pieters, with private upper floors, a real workspace, and easy public transport. Live dates and price still need Airbnb confirmation.

amigoPrompts.label: What should guests know?
amigoPrompts.answer: Guests should know the apartment is on upper floors and requires stairs. The listing highlights self check-in, strong transport access, and a private lockable entrance after the shared front door.

amigoPrompts.label: Can I book directly?
amigoPrompts.answer: Not yet. This site guides the decision, while Airbnb handles live availability, pricing, cancellation, payment, and messaging.
